description:
Join us on Wednesday, June 3, from 4-7 PM at Whispering Vine South Creek for a Ferrari-Carano whites tasting featuring four crisp, textured and cellar-worthy bottles across Pinot Grigio, Rosé and Chardonnay.

Tasting Fee: $25 per person (Buy a bottle from the tasting and your fee is refunded)

Featured Wines:

  • Ferrari-Carano Pinot Grigio 2024 (California) - $13.99 | Winery $35 - Lychee, orange blossom, peach and jasmine with mango, orange zest, melon and crisp acidity.
  • Ferrari-Carano Dry Sangiovese Rosé 2025 (Sonoma County) - $13.99 | Winery $17 - Strawberry cream, watermelon, raspberry and orange zest with cranberry, white cherry and blood orange.
  • Ferrari-Carano Tre Terre Chardonnay 2023 (Russian River Valley) - $26.99 | Winery $35 - Apple, pear, lemon curd, baking spice and vanilla-toned richness with a creamy, balanced finish.
  • Ferrari-Carano Reserve Chardonnay 2022 (Carneros) - $29.99 | Winery $48 - Apple crisp, caramel popcorn, golden apple, pear, peach cobbler and toffee with a long creamy finish.

Come explore Ferrari-Carano Whites and find your favorite bottle. Buy a bottle and your tasting is free.
title: Ferrari-Carano Whites Tasting
